creator: admin@vladiom.com.ua
text:
P.P.S.
# less /etc/make.conf
BATCH=YES
CPUTYPE?=core2

OPTIONS_SET=CUPS
WITHOUT_LPR=YES

WITH_PKGNG=YES

WITH_NEW_XORG=YES

NO_WARNING_PKG_INSTALL_EOL=yes

DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=apache=2.2


# make showconfig
===> The following configuration options are available for mtr-0.85_1:
     GLIB=off: Build with glib library
     IPV6=on: IPv6 protocol support
     X11=on: Build X11-enabled mtr
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings
